title: Javascript Loops
description: Learn for loop and while loop in Python,
content: loops allow repeating operations example there are different type of loop like for loop while loop for loops are used where the number of iteration is known beforehand while loops are used where the number of iteration is not known beforehand for loop in this example the for loop iterates over a sequence of numbers generated by the function which produces numbers from 0 to 4 the loop executes the block of code printing the current value of for each number in the sequence while loop
